Who I Am

Driven by Detail,
Powered by People

I'm Catherine, a Customer Support Specialist with hands-on experience in financial and logistics accounts. I bring a methodical, client-first approach to every interaction — whether it's resolving a complex account inquiry, addressing concerns, or ensuring every customer feels heard and valued.

My background in engineering sharpened my analytical thinking, while my customer service career built my empathy and communication skills. I thrive in fast-paced remote environments and love finding efficient solutions to complex problems.

Currently actively looking for remote VA and customer support opportunities — available for full-time, part-time, or freelance roles.

Why Choose Me

Why Hire Catherine?

Here's what sets me apart from other Virtual Assistants.

⚡

Fast & Reliable

I deliver tasks on time, every time. You can count on me to stay on top of deadlines and communicate proactively — no micromanaging needed.

🎯

Detail-Oriented

With a background in engineering and customer support, I catch errors before they become problems. Accuracy and thoroughness are second nature to me.

💬

Clear Communicator

Fluent in English and Filipino, I keep clients informed, ask the right questions, and adapt my communication style to fit your team's needs.

🌱

Always Learning

I embrace new tools and processes quickly. Whether it's a new CRM, project management platform, or workflow — I get up to speed fast.

🤝

Client-First Mindset

Your success is my priority. I treat every client's business as if it were my own, going the extra mile to ensure satisfaction and smooth operations.

🌏

Remote-Ready

Experienced in fully remote environments with the tools, discipline, and setup to work independently and collaborate seamlessly across time zones.

Career Path

Work Experience

Over 1 year of professional experience across financial and logistics support environments.

Customer Support Specialist · Hopla.online
May 2025 – February 2026 · Logistics Account
  • Track and monitor customer shipments with real-time, accurate updates on package status
  • Respond to multi-channel inquiries regarding orders, deliveries, and returns
  • Investigate and resolve lost, delayed, or damaged package cases with logistics teams
  • Document customer interactions and resolutions accurately in the CRM system
  • Follow up on open cases to ensure complete resolution and high satisfaction
Customer Service Representative · Foundever
May 2024 – January 2025 · Financial Account
  • Assisted customers with loan account inquiries including balances, payments, and disputes
  • Processed loan transactions and account modifications per company policies
  • Utilized Salesforce CRM to log, track, and manage customer cases
  • Escalated complex financial issues to appropriate departments
  • Maintained confidentiality standards for sensitive financial and personal data
  • Consistently met KPIs: call quality, handle time, and CSAT scores

What I Offer

Services

I can help your business with a wide range of virtual support tasks.

01
Customer Support
Email, live chat, and phone support — handling inquiries, complaints, and follow-ups professionally.
02
Admin & Data Entry
Accurate data encoding, record management, spreadsheet maintenance, and document preparation.
03
Order & Logistics Support
Tracking shipments, coordinating with couriers, and resolving delivery-related customer issues.
04
CRM Management
Logging interactions, updating records, and maintaining organized client databases in Salesforce or similar tools.
05
Email & Calendar Management
Organizing inboxes, scheduling meetings, drafting professional responses, and managing communications.
06
Content & Design Support
Creating simple visual content, social media graphics, and presentations using Canva and Office tools.
